Documentation for Flask, a lightweight WSGI web application framework, including installation and usage.

# Purpose
The document provides an overview and essential information about Flask, a lightweight WSGI web application framework. It explains that Flask is designed for ease of use and scalability, starting as a simple wrapper around Werkzeug and Jinja. The document includes installation instructions using `pip`, a simple example of a Flask application, and guidance on contributing to the project. It also encourages donations to support the Pallets organization, which maintains Flask and its associated libraries. Additionally, the document provides links to various resources, including official documentation, source code, and community support channels.
